216 G1FA G1FA_SELF_LOC_OFFU (G1FA) Locomotion off Unit Self Performance CHAR 1 Physical functioning and structural problems: locomotion off unit - ADL self-performance "-" = Unknown, 0 = Independent - No help or oversight -OR- Help/oversight provided only 1 or 2 times during last 7 days, 1 = Supervision - Oversight, encouragement or cueing provided 3 or more times during last 7 days -OR- Supervision (3 or more times) plus physical assistance provided
